AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_1.korean: 타깃 위치 확인. 3분 뒤 VIP 라운지로 이동할 거야.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_1.english: Target location confirmed. We’ll move to the VIP lounge in three minutes.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_10.english: It’s only because the higher‑ups decided so.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_12.english: Rules are meant to be broken.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_13.korean: 하아… 첫 임무부터 이렇게 삐거덕댄다니. 앞날이 훤하다, 훤해…
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_13.english: Sigh… starting my first mission already this shaky. The future looks so… clear.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_14.korean: 대체 내가 전생에 무슨 죄를 지어서 이런 제멋대로인 바보 녀석이랑…
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_14.english: What sin did I commit in a past life to end up with such a selfish idiot…

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_15.korean: 그러게. 난 대체 어떤 씻을 수 없는 과오를 저질렀길래 저런 괴력 조폭 고릴라랑…
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_15.english: Yeah… what unforgivable mistake did I make to be stuck with a brute‑force thug gorilla…

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_16.korean: 가능하면 레베카 씨처럼 상냥하고, 몸매도 끝내주는 요원과 파트너가 되고 싶었는데…
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_16.english: I’d have rather partnered with someone like Rebecca—sweet and with a killer figure…

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_2.english: I’m about to move, so get ready.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_3.korean: 음… 아니, 계획을 변경하는 게 좋겠어.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_3.english: Hmm… actually, we should change the plan.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_4.korean: 경비원들이 예상보다 훨씬 빠르게 도착할 모양이야.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_4.english: Looks like the guards are arriving much faster than we expected.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_5.korean: 뭐? 그러면 타깃을 VIP 라운지가 아닌 곳에서 처리해야 되잖아.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_5.english: What? Then we have to handle the target somewhere other than the VIP lounge.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_8.korean: 나랑 파트너가 된 이상, 반드시 작전은 사전에 협의한 계획대로 이행한다.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_8.english: Since you’re my partner, you have to carry out the operation exactly as we agreed.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_9.korean: 내가 뭐 원해서 너랑 파트너가 됐나?
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_9.english: Like I chose to be your partner or anything.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_18.korean: 그리고 몸매라면 레베카랑 붙어도 절대 안 밀리거든!
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_18.english: And as for the figure, I could hold my own even against Rebecca!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_19.korean:
파트너로서 걱정돼서 그러는 건데, 너 그거 엄연한 자의식 과잉이다? 
설마 그 조그만 한입 짜리 자두의 존재를 알면서도 그런 소리를 하는 거야?
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_19.english: I’m only saying this because I’m worried as your partner, but that’s just excessive self‑consciousness. You wouldn’t say that knowing there’s that tiny plum‑sized thing, would you?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_20.korean: 이 가슴이 어딜 봐서 자두야! 너 이렇게 큰 자두 봤어?
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_20.english: How can you call this chest a plum! Have you ever seen a plum this big?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_21.korean: 지금은 슈트 때문에 눌려서 그렇지, 벗으면 굉장하거든!?
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_21.english: It’s just the suit squeezing me now; once I take it off, I’m amazing!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_22.english: Orange… no, at least an apple!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_23.korean: 그 사과라는 게 설마 루비에스 사과 말하는 거야? 적어도 멜론은 돼야 하지 않겠어?
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_23.english: Are you talking about that Ruby‑S apple? It should be at least a melon, don’t you think?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_27.korean: 뭐 어때? 어차피 정면으로 뚫고 들어갈 생각이었어.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_27.english: So what? I was planning to charge straight through anyway.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_28.korean: 임무 실패하면 전부 네 책임야! 알겠냐, 돌대가리?!
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_28.english: If the mission fails, it’s all on you! Got it, blockhead?!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_29.korean: 그럼 실패 안 하게 잘 따라오ㅡ
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_29.english: Then just follow my lead so we don’t fail—

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_30.english: Sorry, I gotta use the bathroom!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_31.english: What!? I was just getting pumped up…!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_32.korean: 영화 시작하기 전에 안 다녀오고 뭐 한 거야?
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_32.english: What were you doing before the movie started?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_33.english: I didn’t need to go then!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_36.english: Ahaha… don’t be too hard on me.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_37.english: I’ve been holding it in for quite a while, it seems.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_38.korean:
마침 잘 됐네.
나는 마실 것 좀 더 가져올게.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_38.english: Perfect timing. I’ll grab some more drinks.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_41.korean: 그럼… 나도 한 대 피우고 와야겠군.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_41.english: Then… I guess I’ll go have a smoke as well.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_42.korean: 하이에나가 화장실 가니까 나도 갑자기 마려워졌어…
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_42.english: Since the hyena went to the bathroom, I suddenly need to pee too…

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_43.korean: 그럼 지금 빨리 다녀오시는 게 어때요?
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_43.english: Then why not just go right now?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_44.korean: 괜찮아. 아직은 더 참을 수 있어.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_44.english: It’s fine. I can hold out a bit longer.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_45.english: Besides, I still have a trump card left.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_48.korean: 여기 다 마신 음료수 캔을 모아서…
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_48.english: Gather all the empty cans here…

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_49.korean: 좋은 말 할 때 지금 다녀와.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_49.english: When I’m being nice, go take care of it now.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_53.korean: 아하하… 왠지 모르게 저도 조금 마려워져서요…
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_53.english: Ahaha… I don't know why, but I feel like I need to go too…

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_59.english: Hehe… watching a movie with Captain Khan…

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_63.english: Huh? What? Where did everyone go?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_65.korean: 아무래도 좋게 보내줄 생각은 없나 보네.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_65.english: Looks like they aren't planning to let us go peacefully.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_67.korean: 솔직히 처음엔 못마땅했지만, 너랑 했던 임무들… 지금 와서 돌이켜보니 생각보다 나쁘지 않았어…
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_67.english: Honestly, I wasn't thrilled at first, but the missions we did together… looking back now, they weren't as bad as I thought.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_70.korean: 머리에 구멍 날 뻔했잖아! 그리고 쓸데없이 왜 유언 같은 대사를 뱉는 거야!
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_70.english: You almost made a hole in your head! And why are you spouting those useless, last‑will‑like lines!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_71.english: Just… because the mood called for it?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_73.korean: 나는 무슨 일이 있어도 너랑 같이 살아 돌아갈 거야.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_73.english: No matter what happens, I'll come back alive with you.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_75.korean: 파트너의 계획이 그렇다면야 어쩔 수 없지…
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_75.english: If that's the partner's plan, there's nothing I can do…

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_76.korean: 조폭 고릴라랑 같이 살아서 돌아가는 수밖에!
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_76.english: We have no choice but to survive and return with the gangster gorilla!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_77.english: Whoa… something's blowing up like crazy.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_79.english: You must've had a hard time taking that shot.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_80.korean: 영화라는 걸 이렇게 끝까지 본 적 없었는데, 재미있네요.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_80.english: I've never watched a movie all the way through like this before—it's fun.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_82.korean: 나도 영화를 즐겨 보진 않지만… 가끔은 나쁘지 않군.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_82.english: I don't usually watch movies, but… sometimes they're not bad.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_83.korean: 특히 이 마지막 장면, 마음에 들어.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_83.english: Especially this final scene, I like it.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_84.korean:
…멋지군.
나도 한 번쯤 저런 걸 해보고 싶다는 생각이 든다.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_84.english: …Cool. Makes me want to try something like that sometime.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_92.english: Thanks for inviting me to watch together today.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_93.english: If I get the chance, I'll come again.
